Feature Registry
================

The registry layer is responsible for discovering available features and
validating that they satisfy the expected contract.

Responsibilities
----------------

- discover extractor implementations
- register feature metadata
- validate dependencies and units
- surface configuration errors early

Reference pages
---------------

- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.registry.discovery`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.registry.feature_registry`
- :doc:`../api/generated/voxatlas.registry.validator`
